name: Light It Up - Glow
description: Light It Up - Glow Game Here Jump, flip and swing your tiny little body from one neon color shape to another to make them glow and light up. Collect stars as you jump and flip to raise your level. If you miss a jump, if your flip isn’t on point, or if you hit a spike… you fall into nothing ...(like nothing).
